name: TherapeuticsMD, Inc.
business: TherapeuticsMD is a pharmaceutical royalty company that receives royalties on products licensed to pharmaceutical organizations. Its primary revenue comes from the Mayne License Agreement for products including IMVEXXY, BIJUVA, ANNOVERA, and prenatal vitamins, commercialized by Mayne Pharma in the U.S. and by Knight and Theramex internationally.
sellsTo: Pharmaceutical licensees (Mayne Pharma, Knight, Theramex) for commercializing products in the U.S. and select international markets

exposures.sentence: On December 30, 2022, we granted Mayne Pharma an exclusive license to commercialize our IMVEXXY, BIJUVA and prescription prenatal vitamin products sold under the BocaGreenMD and vitaMedMD brands (collectively, the Licensed Products) in the United States and its possessions and territories.
